zh.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: 英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利
zh.Withernwick, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾維黑恩維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Fauconberge於大約1140年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Piers de Fauconberge16歲，母親Beatrice11歲。他和Agnes FitzSimon至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1216年在英國越可爾維黑恩維其可享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利。

zh-hans.Withernwick, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾維黑恩維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Fauconberge于大约1140年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Piers de Fauconberge16岁，母亲Beatrice11岁。他和Agnes FitzSimon至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1216年在英国越可爾維黑恩維其可享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Fauconberge was born about 1140, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Piers de Fauconberge, was 16 and his mother, Beatrice, was 11. He had at least 1 son with Agnes FitzSimon. He died about 1216, in Withernwick, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Fauconberge est né environ 1140, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Piers de Fauconberge, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 11 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnes FitzSimon. Il est décédé environ 1216, à Withernwick, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Fauconberge um 1140 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Piers de Fauconberge 16 und seine Mutter Beatrice 11. Er hatte mit Agnes FitzSimon mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1216 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Withernwick, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Fauconberge è nato il circa 1140 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Piers de Fauconberge, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice, aveva 11 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnes FitzSimon. Morì circa 1216, nel Withernwick, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングリゼ
ja.Withernwick, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウィスエルンウィック
ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Fauconbergeが約1140年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Piers de Fauconbergeは16歳，母Beatriceは11歳であった。彼はAgnes FitzSimonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1216年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィスエルンウィックで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングリゼにて埋葬された。

ko.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스
ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Fauconberge(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Piers de Fauconberge(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Agnes FitzSimon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1216년 영국 요르크실르 위더윅에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Fauconberge nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Piers de Fauconberge, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 11 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Agnes FitzSimon. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1216, em Withernwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Rise, Yorkshire East Riding, England, Un: рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Fauconberge родился около 1140 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Piers de Fauconberge было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 11. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agnes FitzSimon. Он умер около 1216 г. в местности витирнвикк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности рис, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Agnes FitzSimon.
